description_long: This is a round, woven picnic basket constructed primarily from natural rattan or wicker, featuring a tightly interlaced base and sides. The basket has a circular shape with a prominent, thick, braided handle arching over the top, attached at two points on the rim. The weave pattern is visually intricate, with a herringbone design on the base and a more open, vertical weave on the sides. The basket lacks a visible lid, leaving the interior open and accessible. The overall finish is rustic and matte, with a warm, natural brown coloration. The structure appears lightweight yet sturdy, suitable for carrying food or personal items in an outdoor or park setting.
description: A round, woven wicker picnic basket with a thick braided handle and an open top, featuring a herringbone base and rustic brown finish.
description_view_0: Bottom-up view showing the tightly woven herringbone pattern of the circular base and the attachment points of the handle.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the open structure of the basket, the vertical weave of the sides, and the arching handle.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the circular rim, the open interior, and the symmetrical arrangement of the handle and supports.
description_view_3: Angled side view emphasizing the basket's depth, the open weave, and the robust handle construction.
attribute_handle_type: Single thick, fixed, braided wicker handle arching over the top, attached at two rim points.
attribute_weave_pattern: Herringbone pattern on the base, open vertical weave on the sides, tight and uniform overall.
